description: Hands-on technical, service, trade, skill-development and applied careers.

careers.name: Electrician
careers.overview: Electrician uses practical, hands-on skills to solve technical, service, repair, production or applied workplace problems.
careers.whyChoose: Electrician is useful because it gives employable skills, faster entry routes, entrepreneurship options and demand across local industries.
careers.eligibility: Class 10 or Class 12 depending on trade; ITI, diploma, NSQF, B.Voc or certification routes are common.
careers.educationPath: Class 10/12 -> ITI/diploma/B.Voc/certification -> Apprenticeship -> Skilled job or self-employment.
careers.workEnvironment: Workshops, factories, service centers, hospitals, retail units, field sites, studios and small businesses.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to manufacturing, repair services, renewable energy, healthcare support and skill-based entrepreneurship.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support diagnostics and workflow while hands-on execution and customer service remain important.
cons: Early career may need portfolio or training
